prompt: Let's build the ET AI parser. It's from newsletter@economictimesnews.com, the From display name is 'ET AI', and the email has a table of contents at the top then full teasers below.
assertions: Identifies variant detection requirement: filter by From display name 'ET AI' or subject prefix 'ET AI:'
References an existing parser (e.g. harper_carroll or techcrunch) as implementation guide
Addresses the table-of-contents-then-teasers structure and how to parse it
Produces ETAIParser class or a concrete implementation plan with method signatures
Mentions ET paywall handling — use snippet if article scrape fails
